info.title: Outlets Service
info.description: Manages press outlets (publications) and their campaign relevance data. Domain rating data is managed by the ahref-service.

apiKey.name: x-api-key
apiKey.description: API key for authenticating requests. Must match OUTLETS_SERVICE_API_KEY env var.

get.description: Returns outlet discovery stats (count, avg relevance, search queries used). Supports filtering by brandId, campaignId, workflowName and optional groupBy.

post.summary: Discover relevant outlets via Google search + LLM scoring
post.description: Takes a brand brief, generates search queries via LLM, searches Google via google-service, scores results for relevance via LLM, and bulk upserts discovered outlets into the database.

get.summary: Outlets with recent articles to search
All outlets for a campaign, sorted by relevance score descending

200.description: Campaign outlets sorted by relevance score (descending)
